query: SELECT JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(triggerRules, '$[0]')) as rule, tier, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM opportunities GROUP BY rule, tier ORDER BY tier, cnt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(triggerRules, '$[0]')) as rule, tier, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM opportunities GROUP BY rule, tier ORDER BY tier, cnt DESC;
